arts.ttl: PSG believe they can convince Aston Villa to sell Jhon Duran as early as THIS MONTH - with the French champions keen to include unwanted star in deal for Colombian striker
arts.sum: Paris St Germain believe they can persuade Aston Villa to sell Jhon Duran this summer or even as early as this month. The Colombian has been one of the stars of Villa's season, scoring 12 goals.

Although he is under contract until 2027, his choice not to sign an extension has sparked speculation about his future. arts.ttl: Report: PSG & Napoli Set for Crunch Khvicha Kvaratskhelia Meeting – Agreement on the Horizon
arts.sum: Napoli and Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly on the brink of agreeing Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's long-rumored transfer to Ligue 1. According to Gianluca Di Marzio, the clubs will hold a crunch meeting next week to iron out the final details ahead of the Georgian's move to France.
